slots.name: eyebrow
slots.notes: Small label above the title. e.g. 'Features', 'Why choose us'

slots.name: section_title
slots.notes: Section title, supports LineReveal effect on scroll

slots.name: section_subtitle
slots.notes: 1-2 sentence supporting description for the main title

slots.name: features
slots.notes: List of feature cards: { icon, title, description, grid_size, bg_color?, content_type, custom_widget_type }

layout_variants.name: Interactive Grid Slideshow (Ref 1 - Custom)
layout_variants.description: Diverse grid layout combined with staggered cover revealer transitions, mouse parallax scaled by distance, and a 3-layer hover color sweep.

visual_specs.typography: Ultra-large uppercase Heading Kanit (font-bold text-[7vw] leading-[0.8] tracking-[-0.03em] uppercase), vertical title (writing-mode: vertical-lr), compact body text layout (text-sm max-w-[280px]).
visual_specs.spacing: Fixed gap between grid items at 20px. 3em border padding. Fixed height layout of 80vh.
visual_specs.colors: Soothing neutral light/dark background. Hover sweep overlay consists of 3 matching color layers: layer 1 (#093C5D), layer 2 (#165780), layer 3 (rgba(9,59,93,0.45)).
visual_specs.layout: CSS Grid divided into 30 columns / 30 rows. Child elements are assigned precise asymmetric grid-area coordinates (e.g. grid-area: 8/5/22/15 for the main image).

code_blueprint.gsap_timeline: Use Promises and a slide transition timeline: 1. scale3d(0->1) the .revealer class of the current card to cover it (ease: 'power3.inOut', duration: 0.8s, stagger delay based on data-delay from 40ms to 500ms). 2. Change the active slide index. 3. scale3d(1->0) the .revealer class of the new card to reveal the new content.
code_blueprint.scroll_trigger: gsap.to('.grid-section-title', { scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.grid-section', start: 'top 90%', end: 'top 75%', scrub: 1 }, y: 0, opacity: 1, ease: 'none' })
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: 1. Mousemove: const transX = (2 * maxTransX / win.width) * mouse.x - maxTransX; const dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy); const tx = (transX / win.width) * (dist + 200); gsap.to(item, { x: tx, y: ty, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out' }). 2. Hover layers: Run CSS keyframes gridHoverFill (translateX(-102% -> 0%)) and gridHoverPush (translateX(0 -> 102%)) with out-of-phase delays.
code_blueprint.css_classes: .grid__item { position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.2s ease-out; } .revealer { position: absolute; inset: -2px; background: var(--bg); transform-origin: 100% 50%; opacity: 0; } .grid__item-hover-layer { position: absolute; inset: 0; transform: translate3d(-102%, 0, 0); }

anti_patterns: Do not use equally split grids (like 3 or 4 equal columns).
Do not animate width/height directly; use scale3d/translate3d instead.
Do not use outdated box-shadows or neon-colored border-left styles on cards.

layout_variants.name: Interactive UI Bento Grid (Ref 2)
layout_variants.description: A 2-row bento grid with 5 asymmetric cards integrated with interactive animated widgets: self-drawing flowcharts and a typewriter code block.

visual_specs.typography: Bold geometric sans-serif heading font, elegant Mono font for the code block.
visual_specs.spacing: Gap-6 between bento cards. Internal padding for each card py-6 px-8.
visual_specs.colors: Minimalist black background. Neon oklch(0.75 0.15 140) connection lines with 20% opacity.
visual_specs.layout: Bento Grid split into 2 rows: row 1 consists of 2 large cards (span 3/6 and span 3/6), row 2 consists of 3 small cards (span 2/6 each).

code_blueprint.gsap_timeline: Auto typewriter typing timeline (Typewriter effect) for code block: gsap.to('.code-text', { text: { value: 'const user = invite();' }, duration: 1.5, ease: 'none', delay: 0.5 }).
code_blueprint.scroll_trigger: ScrollTrigger draws flowchart: gsap.fromTo('.svg-flow-path', { strokeDashoffset: 1000 }, { strokeDashoffset: 0, scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.bento-container', start: 'top 80%', end: 'bottom 40%', scrub: true } })
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: Card hover: gsap.to(card, { y: -6, duration: 0.4, ease: 'power3.out' }) combined with MouseMove Spotlight under glassmorphism background.
code_blueprint.css_classes: .bento-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(6, 1fr); gap: 1.5rem; } .svg-flow-path { stroke-dasharray: 1000; stroke-dashoffset: 1000; }

anti_patterns: Do not use border-radius larger than 16px for bento cards.
Do not use thick colored border-left as an accent.
Do not abuse typewriter effects on all bento text; limit it to code widgets only.

layout_variants.name: Typographic Editorial Bento Grid (2D Swiss)
layout_variants.description: Minimalist 2D bento grid in fashion magazine/editorial style. Cards are separated by thin 1px oklch lines with high contrast. Uses bold Kanit display font, text-wrap: balance. Animations: Headings use staggered LineReveal slide-up on scroll. Cards use subtle bottom-up ScrollReveal.

visual_specs.typography: Display Heading using ultra-bold Kanit or Inter (font-black text-[5vw] leading-none), body paragraphs limited to 60ch.
visual_specs.spacing: Bento grid gap-px (uses 1px thin divider lines instead of large gaps). Internal cell padding py-12 px-10.
visual_specs.colors: Neutral light oklch(0.98 0.002 240) or dark oklch(0.12 0.005 240) with minimal brand tints. 1px thin divider borders in oklch(0.85 0.005 240).
visual_specs.layout: Asymmetrically scaled 2D Bento Grid (e.g. span 4/12, span 8/12, span 6/12) creating a balanced editorial layout.

code_blueprint.gsap_timeline: LineReveal slide-up animation for main heading: gsap.fromTo('.line-reveal-word', { yPercent: 100, opacity: 0.1 }, { yPercent: 0, opacity: 1, ease: 'none', scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.features-grid', start: 'top 85%', end: 'top 60%', scrub: 1 } })
code_blueprint.scroll_trigger: ScrollReveal outer wrapper for bento items: gsap.fromTo(item, { y: 30, opacity: 0 }, { y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 0.8, ease: 'power3.out', scrollTrigger: { trigger: item, start: 'top 95%', once: true } })
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: When hovering over each bento cell, trigger a minimalist micro-interaction (e.g. text horizontal translation of 4px: gsap.to(text, { x: 4, duration: 0.2, ease: 'power2.out' }) and a subtle border color transition).
code_blueprint.css_classes: .bento-container { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); gap: 1px; background-color: var(--border-color); } .bento-item { background-color: var(--bg-color); transition: background-color 0.3s; }

anti_patterns: Do not use border-radius larger than 8px for Swiss-style bento cells (Swiss style requires sharp corners or tiny 4px-8px radii).
Do not use diffused shadows (box-shadow) on bento cards; Swiss layouts rely on flat 2D divider lines.
Do not blend too many different colors on the bento background; keep a Restrained palette (neutrals + 1 accent).

line_reveal_header.intent: Heading and description text reveal line-by-line (LineReveal component) on scroll: Splits text into words grouped by actual browser offsetTop for responsiveness, sliding up gently (y: 24px -> 0px) and fading in from opacity 0.1 to 1.0 based on scroll position. Scroll reverse: Slides back down and fades out.

spec.type: gsap ScrollTrigger scrub per offsetTop row

staggered_cards_reveal.intent: Grid cards reveal sequentially in a staggered diagonal wave pattern from bottom to top.

flowchart_svg_draw.intent: Draws flowchart connecting lines between step cards, tracing scroll progress dynamically.

widget_3d_float.intent: 3D models (chips, helical spheres) and phone mockups floating vertically with scroll speed to create parallax depth.

background_mesh_parallax.intent: Background dot grid/mesh moves deeply at a 0.15 parallax ratio on scroll to create spatial depth.

spotlight_follow_mouse.intent: On card hover: An emerald/neon circular gradient glow (Spotlight) tracks the mouse coordinates under the glassmorphic card.

mouse_3d_tilt.intent: 3D Mouse Tilt effect on card hover: Measures mouse coordinates relative to the card center and rotates the X and Y axes up to 6 degrees using spring physics.

chart_bars_pulse.intent: On hovering a card containing a 3D bar chart: Bars pulse up and down continuously to create a dynamic rhythm.

badge_tag_spring.intent: On hovering a card with badge tags: badge tags bounce and scale with spring physics.

model_3d_rotation_loop.intent: 3D spiral sphere models and blockchain icons rotating slowly indefinitely.

glow_shimmer_border.intent: A thin light shimmer sweep tracing the glassmorphic card borders periodically every 5 seconds.

in.description: Inherits background color from the preceding hero or logo-bar to keep a seamless design flow.

out.description: Fades out softly before transitioning to the subsequent how-it-works or showcase sections.

flow.notes: Core section for presenting key features and value propositions of the product/service.
